# Cs2Gs.CodeModel emit-AST surface (generated by CodeModelSurfaceTests).
# On drift: add printer coverage plus a GNodeSamples entry for each new node
# type, then replace this golden with the generated `.actual` file.

[enums]
AccessorKind = Get, Set, Init
BindingKind = Let, Var, Const
CollectionInitializerElementKind = Expression, Keyed, Indexed
LiteralKind = Int, Float, String, Bool, Char, Null
TypeDeclarationKind = Class, Struct, DataClass, DataStruct, InlineStruct, Interface
Variance = None, Out, In
Visibility = Default, Public, Internal, Private, Protected
